title: Flow Chart Edges
description: Represents a connection between two nodes in the flow chart, including identifiers and endpoint anchors.

props.name: source
props.description: Source endpoint of the edge, including node id and anchor name.

props.name: target
props.description: Target endpoint of the edge, including node id and anchor name.

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: Canonical TypeScript definition of the edge type.

data.content: export interface AXFlowChartEdges { id: string; source: { id: string; anchor: string }; target: { id: string; anchor: string }; }
